# CPT-Dawn

> Interactive personal portfolio and digital identity.

## Links
- [GitHub](https://github.com/CPT-Dawn)
- [X (Twitter)](https://x.com/CPT_Dawn)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/cptdawn/)
- [Resume](https://github.com/CPT-Dawn/Resume)

## Technical Stack
- Vanilla HTML/JS/CSS
- Tailwind CSS
- Cloudflare Pages

## AI Agent Capabilities
This site supports:
- **WebMCP**: Exposes `getLinks` tool via browser.
- **Markdown for Agents**: Content-negotiated Markdown at `/` and `/index.html`.
- **API Catalog**: Discovery at `/.well-known/api-catalog`.
- **MCP Server**: SEP-1649 metadata at `/.well-known/mcp/server-card.json`.
- **Web Bot Auth**: Identification via `/.well-known/http-message-signatures-directory`.
